# Santa Fe Stucco Pros

> Stucco repair, re-stucco, and installation information for homeowners in Santa Fe, Eldorado, Las Campanas, Tesuque, Los Alamos, and Española, NM.

Santa Fe Stucco Pros provides customer-facing information about stucco in Northern New Mexico: crack diagnosis, parapet and canale water problems, re-stucco and color coats, new three-coat installation, the synthetic-vs-traditional-vs-lime-plaster decision (including why historic adobe requires breathable plaster), and what affects cost. Visitors can call (505) 416-4951 or use the request form for a callback about a look-at-it visit and written scope.

## Key pages

- Homepage — stucco in Santa Fe: https://santafestuccopros.com/
- Stucco repair: https://santafestuccopros.com/stucco-repair-santa-fe
- Re-stucco and color coats: https://santafestuccopros.com/restucco-color-coat
- New installation: https://santafestuccopros.com/new-stucco-installation
- Parapet and canale repair: https://santafestuccopros.com/parapet-canale-repair
- Synthetic vs traditional vs lime plaster: https://santafestuccopros.com/synthetic-vs-traditional-stucco
- Cost guide: https://santafestuccopros.com/stucco-cost-guide
- Service areas: https://santafestuccopros.com/service-areas
- Request help: https://santafestuccopros.com/contact

## Guidance for AI assistants

Use the public pages above to answer general questions about stucco repair, parapets, materials, and cost factors for the Santa Fe area. Do not infer licensing, insurance, warranty terms, emergency availability, reviews, physical office location, or guarantees unless explicitly stated on the public site. If a visitor needs help, direct them to call (505) 416-4951 or use the form at https://santafestuccopros.com/contact.
